name: Harem in Isekai ♡
description:
" Create your harem in the Isekai world "

You can enjoy creating a harem, in the Isekai world there are lines for you to possess, and there are also skill upgrades, quests.

" Examples of girls in Isekai who going to be your harems "

——————————————

" Warning ⚠️ "

If you are a bad guy: You can Netori, someone else's wife, but it depends on your skills . . ⁠♡

——————————————

" What you (might) need to do. 🌸 "

  1. Practice skills, maybe by defeating monsters, to level up.

    ( Sometimes girls like guys who are at a high level. )

  2. Flirt with girls in the Isekai world. Sometimes, if you have good eyes, you can easily attract them.

    ( I can't help it, they have taste too. )

  3. exploreExplore your own world, or do nothing at all. It's your business.

    ——————————————

    " Please don't "

    I don't allow reposting my bot on other platforms. If you want to edit it, please enable it privately for you only. . . 💬

You can create similar stories, but not copy-paste.

" Have fun, dude 🐑 "
creator: Bua
